detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.
examples: Property foo is required but is missing.

errors.description: Optional list of individual error details

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type. This value should not change between occurrences of the error.

type.description: A URI reference to human-readable documentation for the error.

get.description: Returns all index aliases flattened into one list.

put.description: Applies a batch of alias add/remove actions.

get.description: Returns names of open indices available for analysis.
Returns analyzer names defined in the index settings.

post.description: Runs _analyze with the given analyzer and returns the produced tokens.

get.description: Returns text fields of the index that can be analyzed.

post.description: Runs _analyze against the analyzer of the given field and returns the produced tokens.

get.description: Proxies the given Elasticsearch _cat API and returns its JSON output verbatim.

parameters.description: Name of the _cat API to call, e.g. "indices", "shards", "allocation".
parameters.name: api

schema.description: Name of the _cat API to call, e.g. "indices", "shards", "allocation".

get.description: Returns the current index and node names plus the cluster name, used by the UI to detect cluster topology changes.
Returns the cluster settings (persistent and transient) as reported by Elasticsearch.

put.description: Updates the cluster settings with the given document.

schema.description: Cluster settings document to PUT to _cluster/settings.

parameters.description: Name of the index to create.
parameters.name: index

schema.description: Name of the index to create.
Index creation body (settings, mappings, aliases). Defaults to {}.

get.description: Returns the mappings and settings of an existing index, used to prefill the create-index form.

put.description: Feature-flagged document insert/update for one Elasticsearch index.

post.description: Read-only, feature-flagged document browser for one Elasticsearch index.

get.description: Returns a lightweight data stream list. Use GET /data_streams/{name} for backing indices, stats and lifecycle details.
Returns backing indices, stats and lifecycle information for one data stream.

parameters.description: Whether existing backing indices should have index.lifecycle.name removed.
parameters.name: update_backing_indices

schema.description: Whether existing backing indices should have index.lifecycle.name removed.

delete.summary: Detach ILM policy from data stream

put.summary: Attach ILM policy to data stream

get.description: Returns the index settings in flat format, including defaults.

schema.description: Settings document to PUT to the index _settings.

get.description: Returns the cluster health document (verbatim from _cluster/health), extended with navbar metadata.
Returns one entry per node with roles, heap, disk, CPU and uptime information.
Returns the cluster dashboard payload: health, indices with shard routing, and nodes.
Returns stats (or recovery info) for one shard of an index on a given node.

parameters.description: Node id the shard is allocated on.
parameters.name: node

schema.description: Node id the shard is allocated on.

post.description: Checks connectivity by fetching _cluster/health of the target host.

get.description: Returns the names of the Elasticsearch hosts configured in Cerebro.
